# Vendored dependency

- `roslib.min.js`: roslibjs 1.3.0, downloaded from jsDelivr package `roslib@1.3.0`.
- SHA-256: `49b5a1017a22743163d5dbe4b968500f909a6e44dd2344d4864973cbfbf35cf2`.
- License: BSD-3-Clause; see `ROSLIB-LICENSE.txt`.

The browser bundle is kept in the repository so the robot control page works without internet access.
